project.name: P&C Insurance Analytics Platform
project.author: Dev (Devashish) Neupane
project.framing: Independent synthetic-data portfolio work sample tailored to two NICO hiring contexts.

boundaries.data: Synthetic portfolio data only; no PII, NICO data, or proprietary data.
boundaries.organizationalContext: Illustrative roles, workflows, RACI assignments, decisions, and backlog items; not a representation of NICO operations or commitments.
boundaries.azure: Azure SQL, Synapse, Azure Data Factory, ADLS, Entra, and Power BI are design-only transfer mappings and are not deployed by this project.
boundaries.uat: Author self-review only. No NICO stakeholder validation, approval, production UAT, or production-readiness assessment was performed.
boundaries.performance: Configured workload sizes are not performance results. Timing, latency, throughput, and pass claims require a retained schema-validated CI artifact.
boundaries.affiliation: This portfolio project is not a NICO system, engagement, endorsement, or production implementation.

baselineBackup.scope: Synthetic logical baseline captured before the warehouse-v2 release migrations.

watermarkRemediation.scope: Post-run synthetic cursor repair and strict-advance guard; published fact counts and checksums remained unchanged.

hostedRelease.verificationBasis: Read-only hosted migration history, pg_indexes inspection, and post-run watermark remediation verification.
hostedRelease.claimBoundary: This records deployment sequence and index presence only; it is not evidence of production scale, benchmark performance, production readiness, NICO stakeholder approval, or UAT acceptance.

screenshots.purpose: Desktop IT Business Analyst Delivery Hub traceability and scope-boundary review.
Desktop dual-role landing, proof strip, navigation, and portfolio overview.
Narrow mobile pipeline controls and compact proof/navigation layout.
Mobile Delivery Hub traceability content and synthetic-scope notice.
Mobile dual-role entry point and point-in-time proof strip.

automationArtifacts.availability: GitHub Actions run artifact on browser-gate failure

evidenceNotes: Screenshot values are point-in-time UI observations, not production or benchmark metrics.
Artifact name patterns identify where CI evidence is produced; they do not assert that a specific run passed.
No benchmark timing, latency, throughput, NICO approval, or production-readiness value is encoded in this manifest.
